note: the method call chain might not have had the expected associated types
  --> src/db.rs:62:58

62 |         let mut top_k_results: Vec<SearchResult> = first.into_iter().cloned().chain(std::iter::once(mid.clone())).collect();

note: required by a bound in `std::iter::Iterator::cloned`
  --> /rustc/f8297e351a40c1439a467bbbb6879088047f50b3/library/core/src/iter/traits/iterator.rs:3465:5

  --> src/db.rs:62:79

62 |         let mut top_k_results: Vec<SearchResult> = first.into_iter().cloned().chain(std::iter::once(mid.clone())).collect();

   |
   = note: the following trait bounds were not satisfied:
           `<std::slice::IterMut<'_, api::SearchResult> as Iterator>::Item = &_`
           which is required by `std::iter::Cloned<std::slice::IterMut<'_, api::SearchResult>>: Iterator`
           `std::iter::Cloned<std::slice::IterMut<'_, api::SearchResult>>: Iterator`
           which is required by `&mut std::iter::Cloned<std::slice::IterMut<'_, api::SearchResult>>: Iterator`

error[E0599]: no method named `clone` found for mutable reference `&mut api::SearchResult` in the current scope
  --> src/db.rs:62:105

62 |         let mut top_k_results: Vec<SearchResult> = first.into_iter().cloned().chain(std::iter::once(mid.clone())).collect();
